form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after five months raced on the pace when 3rd of 12 at this track on March 24 over 1500m, 2.5 len behind Fu Dao Le with 57kg at $1.80. Previously second-up 8th of 11 at this track on August 21 over 1500m, 17 len behind Colocation carrying 57kg at $3.20. Even fitter and is an excellent winning chance.
